title: Bash Permission Configuration
description: Configuration for the pi bash-permission extension

allowedExact.description: Commands that are always allowed (exact string match)

deniedExact.description: Commands that are always blocked (exact string match)

allowedPrefixes.description: Command prefixes that are always allowed

deniedPrefixes.description: Command prefixes that are always blocked

confirmTimeout.description: Milliseconds to wait for user response before auto-denying
